responseMessageContents.text:
All done. Here's the summary:

---

### Summary of Changes

**Phase 3.6 — User Roles + Profile System:**
- Extended `User` type with `role` (`customer` | `provider`), `crNumber`, `crVerified`
- Registration now includes role selection (customer/provider cards) and optional CR number field for providers (validated as exactly 10 digits)
- `authService.ts` and `firestoreService.ts` updated to read/write new user fields
- Profile screen now shows role badge, CR number with verification status, and full inline edit form (name, phone, city, CR number)
- "My Equipment" menu item only shows for providers
- Add Equipment tab blocked for non-providers with a clear message

**Phase 3.7 — Request System Stabilization:**
- Fixed `RequestCard` — was using mock data, now fetches real equipment from Firestore
- Improved date formatting in request cards
- Updated request tab labels to "My Sent Requests" / "Incoming Requests"
- Request creation, status transitions (accept/reject/complete/cancel), and provider actions all verified working via existing Firestore logic

**Files Modified:**
1. `expo/types/index.ts`
2. `expo/services/authService.ts`
3. `expo/services/firestoreService.ts`
4. `expo/contexts/AuthContext.tsx`
5. `expo/i18n/translations.ts`
6. `expo/app/register.tsx`
7. `expo/app/(tabs)/profile/index.tsx`
8. `expo/app/(tabs)/add/index.tsx`
9. `expo/app/(tabs)/requests/index.tsx`
10. `expo/components/RequestCard.tsx`

**Pushed to GitHub:** `24f8f13` — `"Phase 3.6 + 3.7: roles system + request system stabilization"`

responseMessageContents.title: Updated the app to include user roles and a better request tracking system.
responseMessageContents.description: We've added a way for you to choose if you are a customer or a service provider when you sign up. Service providers can now add their business registration details. The profile page was updated so you can easily change your information. We also made it easier to track your equipment requests, separated into ones you sent and ones you received. Only service providers are now allowed to list new equipment.
